{{Infobox location
| name = Emperor’s old quarters
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Andel]] and [[Foster]] moved toward the [[Emperor’s old quarters]].}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
